headline: BXP (NYSE:BXP) Q1 Earnings Beat on Portfolio Strength and Strategic Asset Sales
summary: BXP's Q1 earnings topped estimates on portfolio strength and strategic asset sales, with FFO of $1.59 per share beating consensus. Shares rose in after-hours trading despite a slight revenue miss.
